name: Virtual Pet / Tamagotchi Starter
description: Digital pet companion with needs-based simulation. Pet character displays animated states reflecting six core needs (hunger, happiness, energy, hygiene, health, age) that decay in real-time. Action buttons (feed, play, sleep, clean, medicine) modify needs with immediate visual feedback. Includes mini-game for play interaction, three-stage evolution system based on cumulative care quality, notification system for critical needs, dynamic background (day/night/weather), persistent save system using timestamps for offline decay, and memorial screen on pet death.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x with input mappings for action buttons, pause, save

scenes/.main_view.tscn: Node2D with background Sprite2D (day/night variants), pet display area (child scene reference), UI layer (CanvasLayer), notification layer (CanvasLayer), persistent timer for needs decay
scenes/.pet.tscn: Node2D with AnimatedSprite2D (idle/happy/hungry/sleepy/sick/playing animations), particle emitter for status effects (hearts for happy, drops for tired, green cloud for sick), status indicator above head (emoji or icon)

ui/.needs_bars.tscn: CanvasLayer with 6 ProgressBars (hunger, happiness, energy, hygiene, health, age), labels for each need (0-100 scale), color-coded bars (red=critical <20, yellow=warning <50, green=healthy >50)
ui/.action_buttons.tscn: CanvasLayer with 5 Buttons arranged horizontally (Feed, Play, Sleep, Clean, Medicine), button icons, disabled state when pet is sleeping/sick/dead
ui/.notification.tscn: CanvasLayer with popup Label/Panel, appears when need reaches critical (<20), message text varies ("Pet is very hungry!", "Pet is dirty!"), auto-dismiss after 3 seconds, sound effect

minigames/.catch_game.tscn: Node2D mini-game: pet sprite at center, falling objects (food items) spawn at random x positions, player clicks/taps to catch, 10 catches = full play satisfaction, timer 30 seconds, success returns happiness_gained

scenes/.evolution_screen.tscn: Node2D overlay showing evolution animation, old pet fades, new pet sprite appears with level-up effect, "Your pet evolved!" text, plays evolution music, auto-closes after 3 seconds

projectStructure.memorial.tscn: Node2D showing pet name, age_in_days, care_quality_percentage, "Rest in peace" message, pet gravestone sprite/text, date of passing, back to menu button

preBuiltMechanics: Needs system: 6 integer-scaled needs (0-100): hunger, happiness, energy, hygiene, health, age. Each decrements at different rates (hunger/thirst fastest ~1/minute, happiness ~0.5/minute, energy ~0.3/minute when awake, hygiene ~0.2/minute, health ~0.1/minute baseline)
Real-time persistence: uses OS.get_unix_time() at save to record timestamp, on load calculates elapsed seconds and applies proportional need decay (offline continues to accumulate decay)
Pet state machine: idle (all needs ok) → hungry (hunger >70) → sleepy (energy >70) → sad (happiness <30) → sick (health <30) → dead (health = 0 for 60+ seconds)
Pet animation: AnimatedSprite2D with named animations (idle, happy, hungry, sleepy, sick, playing, eating, sleeping, dying), plays based on current state
Feed action: decreases hunger by 30 points, decreases energy by 5 (eating uses energy), plays eating animation (0.5 sec), adds +5 to happiness
Play action: triggers catch_game.tscn, if successful (10 catches), happiness increases by 20, hunger increases by 15 (exercise causes hunger), energy decreases by 25
Sleep action: sets pet to sleep state (immobile), energy increases by 50 points per 5 seconds of sleep, hunger increases 5 per 5 seconds (sleep costs energy), can wake pet with action button
Clean action: hygiene increases by 25 points, plays shower animation (water drops particle effect), happiness increases by 5, slight energy cost (-3)
Medicine action: health increases by 40 points, removes sick state if health >30, happiness decreases by 5 (pet dislikes medicine), plays syringe animation

Evolution system: three evolution stages based on care_quality_score (cumulative average of needs satisfaction). Stage 1 (baby, 0-24 hours age, quality <50%), Stage 2 (teen, 24-48 hours, quality 50-79%), Stage 3 (adult, 48+ hours, quality 80%+)
Care quality calculation: tracks sum of (current_need / 100) per update tick, averages over total ticks, percentage = average * 100
Poop system: spawns poop sprite every 2-3 minutes on screen, decreases hygiene by 15 per poop present, clean action removes poop
Notification system: emit signal when any need drops below 20 (critical), display notification popup with specific message, sound effect, auto-dismiss
Day/night cycle: background Sprite2D swaps between day (light colors) and night (dark colors) based on OS.get_unix_time() hour (0-6 night, 7-18 day, 19-23 evening)
Death mechanic: when health reaches 0, pet enters death state (grey animation), shows memorial screen after 5 seconds, save final pet data to ConfigFile for memorial
Age tracking: increments age_in_days every 86400 seconds (real seconds, not game time), displayed on needs bar, milestone messages at 1 day, 7 days, 30 days
customizationPoints: Expand needs: add stress level, intelligence stat for learning, loyalty trait affecting responsiveness, special ability unlocks at certain ages/qualities
Pet variants: create multiple species (cat, dog, dragon, robot, alien) with unique sprite animations, different need decay rates per species, species-specific mini-games
Mini-games: expand beyond catch game to include memory/matching game (raising intelligence), rhythm game (raising happiness), trivia game (learning-based)
Breeding system: implement pet interaction where two pets can mate, produce offspring with inherited traits, second pet requires separate save data
Item system: implement shop where player earns in-game currency for good care, purchase toys/accessories, items affect need decay rates or pet happiness
Weather system: randomly spawn rain/snow backgrounds, affects pet behavior (pet hides in rain, plays in snow), changes recommended actions
Achievement system: track milestones (first evolution, 100 consecutive days of <20 care, max happiness, never got sick) with badges/trophies
Customization: implement name input, custom coloring (palette swaps), costume accessories that pet wears
Social features: implement leaderboard of longest-lived pets, highest care quality scores, community challenges
Audio design: add background music per time of day, unique sounds per action (eat/play/sleep), pet idle vocalizations based on state, game over music on death
examplePrompts: Create a needs decay system where hunger decreases by 1 point per minute, energy by 0.3 points/minute when awake, and happiness by 0.5 points/minute, with offline persistence tracking elapsed time since last session using OS.get_unix_time()
Implement a state machine that displays pet as hungry (hunger >70), sleepy (energy >70), sad (happiness <30), or sick (health <30), and plays corresponding AnimatedSprite2D animations for each state

Design a three-stage pet evolution system: Stage 1 (baby, <24 hours, care quality <50%), Stage 2 (teen, 24-48 hours, 50-79% quality), Stage 3 (adult, 48+ hours, 80%+ quality), with visual sprite upgrades on evolution
Create a catch mini-game where 10 falling food items spawn randomly at top of screen and fall for 30 seconds, each click catches an item, 10 catches triggers happiness +20 and hunger +15 increase
Implement a day/night cycle where background Sprite2D switches to dark colors during 0-6 and 19-23 hours (using OS.get_unix_time().hour), affecting pet visual tint and available actions
